chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-2404 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-10523/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on MA-10524/19 4. For hearing of main case. 17.10.2019. Mr. Mohammad Ali Rind, advocate for petitioner = Urgency granted. Heard arguments and perused the record. The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has prayed for direction against the respondents to produce the record of right with regard to her share in the property and then to order for its demarcation with separate possession. The controversy with regard to inheritance, demarcation and separate possession of the property being issue of fact could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. The instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limini. The petitioner to approach Revenue / Civil Court having jurisdiction for redressal of her grievance in accordance with law, if so is advised. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa, 2
